valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 14 Jul 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Wed 15 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High Fair Isle 1031 slow moving, declining 1030 by midday tomorrow. Low west FitzRoy 1011, expected just northwest of FitzRoy 1015 by same time
